stemHtml: Comparing the integrated range and the average fuel flow procedure, which of the following statement is correct?

options.a: The average fuel flow procedures allow an accurate monitoring of fuel even for long range flights.
options.b: The integrated range procedure is easier and faster when determining fuel even for long range flights.
options.c: The average fuel flow procedure is more accurate and reflects the fuel consumption during different phases of flight.
options.d: The integrated range procedure is more accurate and reflects the different fuel flows during different phases of flight.
